basic_details.job_title: DRDO INMAS Recruitment 2026: Apply for Research Associate (RA) and Junior Research Fellowship (JRF) Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Institute of Nuclear Medicine and Allied Sciences (INMAS), a specialized laboratory under the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), Timarpur, Delhi has released an official advertisement for Research Associate (RA) (04 Posts) and Junior Research Fellowship (JRF) (11 Posts).

age_limit.details: Maximum Age for RA: 35 years as on the closing date of receipt of applications. | Maximum Age for JRF: 28 years as on the closing date of receipt of applications. | Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates, 3 years for OBC candidates, and other entitled categories as per government rules.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications specified for each post code: | RA-01 (Life Sciences - 02 Posts): PhD in Life Sciences / Biotechnology / Microbiology / Biochemistry / Molecular Biology. Desirable experience in Cell Cultures, Molecular Biology Techniques (RT-PCR & cloning), Cellular Imaging, Pre-clinical studies, LC-MS / Lipidomics / Metabolomics, and Validation/identification of markers. RA-02 (Chemistry - 01 Post): PhD in Material Science / Chemistry / Chemical Science. Desirable experience in Nanomaterials for biomedical & defence applications, polymer/biomaterial/composite material development, and analytical/spectroscopy/microscopy techniques. RA-03 (Pharmaceutical Sciences - 01 Post): PhD in Pharmaceutical Sciences / Pharmaceutics / Pharmacology / Pharmaceutical Chemistry / Medicinal Chemistry / Pharmacy or allied disciplines. Desirable experience in screening, characterization, processes & development of formulations. | JRF-01 (Life Sciences - 05 Posts): First Class M.Sc. in Life Sciences / Biotechnology / Molecular Biology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences with NET (JRF/LS) qualification; OR First Class B.Tech. in Biotechnology / Biomedical Sciences / Biomedical Engineering with valid GATE score; OR First Class M.E./M.Tech. in related disciplines (NET/GATE exempted). JRF-02 (Chemistry - 04 Posts): First Class M.Sc. in Chemistry / Nanotechnology / Chemical Sciences / Computational Chemistry / Polymer Sciences / Material Sciences with NET (JRF/LS); OR First Class B.Tech with valid GATE score in Chemical Engineering; OR M.E./M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering in First Class (NET/GATE exempted). JRF-03 (Pharmaceutics - 01 Post): First Class M.Pharm. / M.S.(Pharm.) / M.Tech.(Pharm.) in Pharmaceutics / Pharmaceutical Sciences / Pharmacology / Pharmaceutical Chemistry / Medicinal Chemistry with NET/GPAT qualification. JRF-04 (Dental Sciences - 01 Post): First Class Bachelor in Dental Science (BDS) from a recognized university/institution with valid registration from the Dental Council of India (DCI) / State Dental Council. | Also Read: CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 Notification Out For 24 Posts

salary_details.jrf tenure: Up to 5 Years (2 Years as JRF + 3 Years as SRF)
salary_details.ra monthly salary: ₹67,000/- + HRA as per DRDO rules + Contingency Grant up to ₹20,000/- per annum
salary_details.jrf monthly salary: ₹37,000/- + HRA (1st & 2nd Year); ₹42,000/- + HRA (as SRF) + Contingency Grant up to ₹15,000/- per annum
salary_details.details: Essential administrative details regarding the vacancy package include:

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete the registration process via email:
Download the prescribed application form (Annexure 'A') from the official DRDO website: www.drdo.gov.in.

Fill out the application form completely (Typed, not Handwritten) and attach supporting documents - educational qualifications, matriculation certificate (for date of birth), GATE/NET/GPAT score card, and caste certificate (if applicable).
Scan all documents into a single combined PDF file.
Name the PDF precisely using this format: POST CODE_YOUR NAME (e.g., RA-01_James).
Send the email with all documents to [email protected] before June 30, 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies available in INMAS DRDO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: INMAS, DRDO has announced a total of 15 vacancies, including 4 Research Associate (RA) posts and 11 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for INMAS DRDO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates must submit their applications via email on or before 30 June 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Research Associate (RA) posts in INMAS DRDO?
faq.answer: Selected Research Associates will receive ₹67,000 per month plus HRA as per DRDO rules and a contingency grant of up to ₹20,000 per annum.

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts?
faq.answer: JRFs will receive ₹37,000 per month plus HRA during the first two years. After promotion to SRF, the fellowship increases to ₹42,000 per month plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for INMAS DRDO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years for Research Associate posts and 28 years for Junior Research Fellow posts as on the application closing date. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for INMAS DRDO RA and JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes application screening, a written test (if required), and a personal interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be considered for further stages.

faq.question: Q7. How can candidates apply for INMAS DRDO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must fill out the prescribed application form, combine all supporting documents into a single PDF, and email it to [email protected] before the closing date

faq.question: Q8. Is NET, GATE, or GPAT mandatory for JRF posts?
faq.answer: Yes, for most JRF disciplines candidates must possess a valid NET, GATE, or GPAT qualification as specified in the eligibility criteria. Certain M.Tech./M.E. candidates may be exempted from this requirement.
